name: Google Workspace Admin MFA Enforced
description: Ensures Google Workspace admin users are enrolled in and enforced on 2-Step Verification
query: SELECT id, primary_email, name, is_admin, is_delegated_admin, is_enrolled_in_2sv, is_enforced_in_2sv FROM google_workspace_users WHERE COALESCE(suspended, false) = false AND COALESCE(archived, false) = false AND (COALESCE(is_admin, false) = true OR COALESCE(is_delegated_admin, false) = true) AND (COALESCE(is_enrolled_in_2sv, false) = false OR COALESCE(is_enforced_in_2sv, false) = false)
remediation: Require and enforce 2-Step Verification for all admin and delegated admin accounts in Google Workspace.
